claim_bullets.bullet_text: Reconciliation with Britain is a 'falacious dream' and leads to ruin for the continent, (raw/1776ThomasPaine.pdf p.11-15).
Britain's interest lies in suppressing American growth, and continued connection would lead to ruin, (raw/1776ThomasPaine.pdf p.11-15).
The only way to ensure peace and prevent civil wars is through independence and a continental form of government, (raw/1776ThomasPaine.pdf p.11-15).
Britain's actions have made any hope of reconciliation futile, (raw/1776ThomasPaine.pdf p.11-15).
The only way to secure America's future is through independence and self-governance, (raw/1776ThomasPaine.pdf p.11-15).

source_record_text: This is the source summary for the 'Document' chapter of Thomas Paine's *Common Sense* (pages 11-15). It argues against reconciliation with Britain, emphasizing the unnaturalness of British rule over America, the dangers of dependence, and the necessity of separation for the continent's peace and prosperity.
